task: Audit async side effects for unchecked failures.

detail.goal: Audit async side effects for unchecked failures.

detail.issue: A failed awaited side effect can escape without explicit classification or recovery.

detail.patch: Wrap the awaited side effect in explicit error handling and return a typed failure result.

detail.critique: The patch turns an implicit runtime rejection into a deterministic failure branch that callers can test.

detail.learnedPattern: Wrap awaited side effects in explicit error handling.
detail.memoryDelta: Added an async side-effect handling pattern to persistent review memory.

result.issue: A failed awaited side effect can escape without explicit classification or recovery.
result.patch: Wrap the awaited side effect in explicit error handling and return a typed failure result.
